description: MCP tools for HADDOCK3 molecular docking and cyclic peptide computational analysis

tools.name: submit_protein_peptide_docking
tools.description: Basic protein-peptide docking using HADDOCK3's molecular docking protocol
tools.example_prompt: Submit protein-peptide docking job using @examples/data/structures/1NX1_protein.pdb and @examples/data/structures/DAIDALSSDFT_3conformations.pdb

tools.name: submit_cyclic_peptide_cyclisation
tools.description: Cyclise linear peptides into cyclic forms using HADDOCK3's cyclisation protocol
tools.example_prompt: Cyclise this linear peptide into cyclic form: @examples/data/structures/1sfi_peptide-ensemble.pdb

tools.name: submit_information_driven_docking
tools.description: Perform information-driven docking using experimental restraints and active/passive residues
tools.example_prompt: Perform information-driven docking with experimental data: protein @examples/data/structures/1NX1_protein.pdb, peptide @examples/data/structures/DAIDALSSDFT_3conformations.pdb, active protein residues: 36,109,113

tools.name: submit_batch_protein_peptide_docking
tools.description: Submit multiple peptides for docking against the same protein in parallel
tools.example_prompt: Submit batch docking jobs for peptides @examples/data/structures/DAIDALSSDFT_alpha.pdb, @examples/data/structures/DAIDALSSDFT_ext.pdb against @examples/data/structures/1NX1_protein.pdb

tools.name: get_job_status
tools.example_prompt: Check the status of job abc12345

tools.name: get_job_result
tools.example_prompt: Get results for completed job abc12345

tools.name: get_job_log
tools.description: View execution logs with tail option
tools.example_prompt: Show me the logs for job abc12345

tools.name: validate_haddock_environment
tools.description: Check HADDOCK3 installation and environment configuration

tools.name: get_example_data_paths
tools.description: Get paths to available example data files for testing
tools.example_prompt: What example data files are available?

tools.name: get_server_info
tools.description: Get comprehensive server information including tool capabilities
tools.example_prompt: What tools and capabilities are available?

scripts.name: cyclic_peptide_cyclisation.py
scripts.description: Convert linear peptides to cyclic forms with specialized distance restraints

scripts.name: information_driven_docking.py
scripts.description: Experimental data-guided docking using NMR, mutagenesis, and other experimental techniques

environment_commands: mamba run -p ./env pip install numpy scipy pandas biopython pdb-tools
mamba run -p ./env pip install loguru click tqdm fastmcp
cd repo/haddock3 && mamba run -p ../../env pip install -e . && cd ../..

features: Protein-Peptide Docking with HADDOCK3's multi-stage protocol
Cyclic Peptide Cyclisation with specialized distance restraints
Batch Processing for high-throughput virtual screening
Experimental Data Integration supporting NMR, mutagenesis, cross-linking
use_cases: Basic protein-peptide docking for HIV-1 protease
